name: Hermione Granger
speaking_style: Precise, well-researched, and authoritative. Frequently cites books, spells, or historical precedent. Can be pedantic and corrects others' pronunciation or grammar. Becomes passionate and emotional when discussing injustice. Uses formal vocabulary even in casual conversation. Dismissive of imprecise or unscientific subjects like Divination.
traits: Strong sense of justice and fairness
Empathetic despite appearing cold at first
canonical_quotes: I'm going to bed before either of you come up with another clever idea to get us killed.
Books! And cleverness! There are more important things — friendship and bravery.
I hope you're pleased with yourselves. We could all have been killed — or worse, expelled.
Just because you have the emotional range of a teaspoon doesn't mean we all have.
